title: Hemionitis niphobola

Within the family Dryopteridaceae, Hemionitis niphobola belongs to the genus Hemionitis, which is a group of ferns native to tropical and subtropical regions. The genus Hemionitis is further divided into several species, each with unique characteristics and geographical distributions. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of conditions such as arthritis, cancer, and respiratory infections.
